arguments.argument:
event_inherited() makeActive() setCollisionBounds(-20,-20,20,-1) image_speed=0.45
//Enemy base statistics eName="Panther Skeleton" eLevel=12 maxLife=170 life=maxLife pointWorth=12 atkPower=5 resType[2]=4 resType[3]=1 resType[4]=4 resType[5]=2 stunResist=2 baseItemChance=50 affiliation=3 dieEffect=0 initDir=0 runAcc=5.5
deathAnim=0
jeremyText="It works like the Ghouls except it's shorter and faster, which means it's more annoying." chaoText="Eh, I've got no comment for this thing." devText="Castlevania 1 had those panthers in the first level, which is why these things were used. The original panthers had a small leap when they reached the edge of a platfrom, which I decided against."
